intent.value: Page-width shell (`fluid` / `fixed` / `full-bleed`) and declarative layout root. On web the node is always `<Surface>` (default `surface="ghost"`) so children get `[data-surface]` token context without an opaque page fill. Omit `layout` for normal block flow; set `layout` to `flex` or `grid` for token-backed flex/grid. Spacing props use spacing scale keys, not raw px.

props.name: alignSelf
props.description: When this `Container` is a flex/grid item, maps to `align-self`.

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent role for the root `<Surface>` — passed through as `appearance` (Surface defaults to `'auto'` when omitted).

props.name: flex
props.description: Flex shorthand on the root (`flex`). When set, overrides `grow` / `shrink` / `basis` for that axis bundle — prefer either `flex` or the longhands, not both.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Deprecated compatibility hint used by older/generated compositions. Consumed so it does not leak to the DOM as an unknown React prop.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Viewport cap when `variant` is `fixed` (number or non-preset string), or CSS `max-width` / token preset on the element. See {@link resolveContainerMaxWidth}.

props.name: surface
props.description: Surface mode for the **root** element (always `<Surface>` on web). Defaults to `'ghost'` when omitted. Container layout classes and styles are applied on that same node (`data-surface` remapping for children). Native ignores `surface` / `appearance` today.

props.name: variant
props.description: Layout variant. - `fluid` (default): grows with viewport, always applies `--Grid-Margin`. - `fixed`: capped at `--Grid-MaxWidth` per breakpoint, centered. - `full-bleed`: no margin, no cap — edge-to-edge.

flex.description: Flex shorthand on the root (`flex`). When set, overrides `grow` / `shrink` / `basis` for that axis bundle — prefer either `flex` or the longhands, not both.

fullWidth.description: Deprecated compatibility hint used by older/generated compositions. Consumed so it does not leak to the DOM as an unknown React prop.

maxWidth.description: Viewport cap when `variant` is `fixed` (number or non-preset string), or CSS `max-width` / token preset on the element. See {@link resolveContainerMaxWidth}.

surface.description: Surface mode for the **root** element (always `<Surface>` on web). Defaults to `'ghost'` when omitted. Container layout classes and styles are applied on that same node (`data-surface` remapping for children). Native ignores `surface` / `appearance` today.

variant.description: Layout variant. - `fluid` (default): grows with viewport, always applies `--Grid-Margin`. - `fixed`: capped at `--Grid-MaxWidth` per breakpoint, centered. - `full-bleed`: no margin, no cap — edge-to-edge.

# Container Machine-Readable Documentation

_Generated from source metadata. Do not edit manually._

## Intent and Purpose

- **Intent**: Page-width shell (`fluid` / `fixed` / `full-bleed`) and declarative layout root. On web the node is always `<Surface>` (default `surface="ghost"`) so children get `[data-surface]` token context without an opaque page fill. Omit `layout` for normal block flow; set `layout` to `flex` or `grid` for token-backed flex/grid. Spacing props use spacing scale keys, not raw px.
- **Task contexts**: container, layout, wrapper, page-width, flex, grid, spacing, surface, a2ui
- **Sentiments**: neutral

## Composition Rules

- **Requires**: 
- **Allows**: children
- **Forbids**: 

## Variant Logic

- **fluid**: use when Fluid
- **fixed**: use when Fixed
- **full-bleed**: use when Full bleed

- **Modality**: desktop, mobile
- **Brand**: theme-scope aware, recipe-driven
- **Mode**: light, dark, surface-context
